innovation_1.name: 三层角信号几何分解与材质分类机制
innovation_1.contribution_statement: We identify the fundamental entanglement of geometry and reflectance in angular signals as the core bottleneck hindering robust non-Lambertian depth estimation.

innovation_2.name: 面向非朗伯体光场深度估计的几何双掩码路由架构
innovation_2.contribution_statement: We propose a three-layer angular signal geometric decomposition and material classification mechanism to explicitly analyze and isolate these coupled properties.
